title: German Sausage and Cabbage Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting casserole filled with sausage, cabbage, and potatoes, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the sausage over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the shredded cabbage to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine the diced potatoes, salt, and caraway seeds (if using).
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the potato mixture.
Add the cooked sausage and cabbage mixture on top of the potatoes.
Top with the remaining potato mixture.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
